## Summary

Describe the problem and your change.

## Why this change

Explain why this is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Build

## How to test

List exact steps reviewers can run.

Example:

```bash
make doctor
make dev
```

If needed, include specific `xcodebuild` commands and expected results.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the PR focused and small.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] I tested locally on macOS.
- [ ] I included screenshots/GIFs for UI changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I verified no secrets or credentials were added.
